allow: PowerShell($url = "https://github.com/jqlang/jq/releases/latest/download/jq-windows-amd64.exe"; $dest = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\usr\\bin\\jq.exe"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "jq instalado en $dest")

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8761/eureka/apps" -Headers @{Accept="application/json"} -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty applications | Select-Object -ExpandProperty application | ForEach-Object { $_.name })
